CREATE TABLE spatial_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, geom GEOMETRY, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO spatial_data (id, geom, description) VALUES (1, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(1 1)', 4326), 'Point feature');
INSERT INTO spatial_data (id, geom, description) VALUES (2, ST_GeomFromText('LINESTRING(1 1, 2 2)', 4326), 'Line feature');
SELECT postgis_proj_version() AS proj_version, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM spatial_data) AS total_records;
SELECT A.id, A.description, postgis_proj_version() FROM spatial_data A INNER JOIN (SELECT id FROM spatial_data WHERE geom IS NOT NULL) B ON A.id = B.id;
SELECT id, ST_AsText(geom) AS geom_text, (SELECT postgis_proj_version()) AS proj_version FROM spatial_data WHERE id < (SELECT MAX(id) FROM spatial_data);
WITH version AS (SELECT postgis_proj_version() AS proj_version) SELECT proj_version FROM version WHERE proj_version IS NOT NULL;
SELECT A.id, B.proj_version FROM (SELECT id FROM spatial_data WHERE description LIKE '%feature%') A CROSS JOIN (SELECT postgis_proj_version() AS proj_version) B;
SELECT id, ST_Intersection(geom, ST_MakeEnvelope(0, 0, 2, 2, 4326)) AS intersect_geom, postgis_proj_version() FROM spatial_data WHERE ST_Intersects(geom, ST_MakeEnvelope(0, 0, 3, 3, 4326));
SELECT COUNT(*) AS feature_count, postgis_proj_version() FROM spatial_data GROUP BY postgis_proj_version();
